title: neltuma affinis
intro: Neltuma affinis is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Neltuma affinis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even treat certain types of infections. Neltuma affinis is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, often combined with other herbs to create a medicinal tea that can be consumed to reap its benefits.
